noActiveSession: No active sessions found for summarization.
tooFewMessages: Session {{id}}... has only {{count}} messages, not enough to summarize.
thresholdNotReached: Session {{id}}... already has {{summaryCount}} summaries, message count ({{messageCount}}) has not reached the next threshold.
summaryCreated: Session {{id}}... Generated summary #{{index}} ({{messageCount}} messages). Trigger reason: {{reason}}
noSessionsNeeded: No sessions need summarization at this time.
